revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a 64x64 pixel-art terrain tile sheet for a game asset. No other outputs.

Canvas and grid contract:
- Exact final image size: 64x64 px.
- Strict 4 rows x 4 columns.
- Each frame/cell is exactly 16x16 px.
- Total frames: 16.
- Every cell filled edge to edge with the tile art while staying inside its own 16x16 cell.
- No visible grid lines, no borders, no tile IDs, no labels, no text, no watermark.
- Solid #FF00FF magenta fills any truly empty transparent-looking space, but the tile art itself should occupy each cell edge-to-edge where appropriate.

Style:
- Crisp low-resolution 16-bit SNES-style pixel art, no antialiasing blur.
- Bright mythical-Japan satoyama palette: mossy grey stone, deep matcha greens, moss greens, soft warm sunlight.
- Top-left light source.
- Dark one-pixel outline and dark mortar lines where useful.
- Cohesive scale and identity across all 16 frames.
- Top-down-oblique tall stone retaining wall / ishigaki tileset, viewed slightly from above and front, about 35 degrees, so the vertical stone face is clearly visible and conveys height.
- Nozura-zumi wild-stone masonry: rounded irregular fieldstones, each individually readable with dark mortar lines.
- Upper stones brighter grey-green; lower stones darker and more moss-covered.
- The tiles must be tileable and useful for constructing a continuous wall, not a visible checkerboard.
- Vary texture, edge breakup, moss patches, lichen cracks, pebbles, and lighting subtly while keeping the set cohesive.

Strict frame layout, left to right by rows:
Row 1 caps / kasaishi, cut-stone cap band at the very top of the wall:
- cell 0: top-left outer corner cap.
- cell 1: straight cap, light grey-green cut stone, slightly rounded top.
- cell 2: straight cap variation.
- cell 3: top-right outer corner cap.
Row 2 upper wall, bright upper section of stacked fieldstone face:
- cell 4: left end with vertical corner detail.
- cell 5: straight upper stone face.
- cell 6: straight upper stone face variation with moss patch.
- cell 7: right end with vertical corner detail.
Row 3 lower wall, darker lower section:
- cell 8: straight lower face with heavier moss and lichen.
- cell 9: straight lower face variation.
- cell 10: lower face with prominent moss clump.
- cell 11: lower face with horizontal crack variation.
Row 4 base, foot of wall meeting lower ground:
- cell 12: straight base variation A, fieldstones with small pebbles, soil, and low grass.
- cell 13: straight base variation B, different pebble and grass placement.
- cell 14: left base corner with ground contact.
- cell 15: right base corner with ground contact.

Avoid completely:
- No characters, no creatures, no birds, no companion animals.
- No Mario, Nintendo, Zelda, Final Fantasy, Pokemon, Dragon Quest, Secret of Mana, Okami, Sakuna characters, logos, or likenesses.
- No samurai armor, no kabuto helmet, no ninja outfit, no two-sword daisho, no guns.
- No modern objects, no horror mood, no dark gloomy palette.
- No letter emblems, modern UI, text, watermark, labels, or grid lines.
